  have h₃ : (-μ).var = μ.var := by
    simp [var, MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.variation_neg]
  rw [h₃]
  -- We need to show that the Radon-Nikodym derivative of -μ w.r.t. μ.var is - (Radon-Nikodym derivative of μ w.r.t. μ.var)
  have h₄ : (-μ).rnDeriv μ.var = -μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by
    -- Use the fact that the integral of -μ is the negative of the integral of μ
    have h₅ : (-μ).rnDeriv μ.var = (-1 : ℂ) • μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by
      -- The Radon-Nikodym derivative of -μ is the negative of the Radon-Nikodym derivative of μ
      have h₅₁ : (-μ : ComplexMeasure α) = (-1 : ℂ) • μ := by
        simp [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try aesop)
      rw [h₅₁]
      -- The Radon-Nikodym derivative of a scalar multiple is the scalar multiple of the Radon-Nikodym derivative
      have h₅₂ : ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).rnDeriv μ.var = (-1 : ℂ) • μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by
        -- Use the property of Radon-Nikodym derivative for scalar multiples
        rw [← MeasureTheory.rnDeriv_smul_of_absolutelyContinuous]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try aesop)

      <;>

      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try aesop)
    -- Simplify the expression to get the desired result
    have h₆ : (-1 : ℂ) • μ.rnDeriv μ.var = -μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul, smul_eq_mul]
      <;>

      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, neg_smul]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>

    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>

have h₁ : (-μ).ang = (-μ).rnDeriv (-μ).var := rfl
  have h₂ : μ.ang = μ.rnDeriv μ.var := rfl
  have h₃ : (-μ).var = μ.var := by simp [var, MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.variation_neg]
  have h₄ : (-μ).rnDeriv (-μ).var = - (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
    -- Use the fact that the Radon-Nikodym derivative of -μ with respect to μ.var is - (Radon-Nikodym derivative of μ with respect to μ.var)
    have h₅ : (-μ : ComplexMeasure α) = -μ := rfl
    have h₆ : (-μ : ComplexMeasure α) = -μ := rfl
    -- Use the property of Radon-Nikodym derivatives for scalar multiples
    have h₇ : (-μ).rnDeriv (-μ).var = (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
      -- Use the fact that -μ is -1 times μ
      have h₈ : (-μ : ComplexMeasure α) = (-1 : ℂ) • μ := by
        simp [ComplexMeasure.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
        <;>
        simp_all [MeasureTheory.Measure.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        aesop
      rw [h₈]
      -- Use the property of Radon-Nikodym derivatives for scalar multiples
      have h₉ : ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).rnDeriv ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).var = (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
        -- Use the fact that the variation of (-1 : ℂ) • μ is the same as the variation of μ
        have h₁₀ : ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).var = μ.var := by
          simp [var, Complex.norm_eq_abs, MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.variation_smul]
          <;>
          simp_all [Complex.abs_def, Complex.normSq_eq_abs, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          aesop
        -- Use the property of Radon-Nikodym derivatives for scalar multiples
        have h₁₁ : ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).rnDeriv ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).var = (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
          rw [h₁₀]
          -- Use the property of Radon-Nikodym derivatives for scalar multiples
          have h₁₂ : ((-1 : ℂ) • μ).rnDeriv μ.var = (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
            -- Use the fact that the Radon-Nikodym derivative of a scalar multiple is the scalar multiple of the Radon-Nikodym derivative
            rw [MeasureTheory.rnDeriv_smul]
            <;> simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
            <;>
            simp_all [Complex.abs_def, Complex.normSq_eq_abs, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
            <;>
            norm_num
            <;>
            aesop
          simpa using h₁₂
        exact h₁₁
      simpa using h₉
    -- Simplify the expression
    have h₁₀ : (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) = - (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
      <;>
      simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      aesop
    rw [h₇, h₁₀]
  -- Combine the results to get the final answer
  calc
    (-μ).ang = (-μ).rnDeriv (-μ).var := by rfl
    _ = - (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) := by rw [h₄]
    _ = -μ.ang := by
      have h₅ : μ.ang = μ.rnDeriv μ.var := rfl
      rw [h₅]
      <;>
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
      <;>
      simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_neg]
      <;>

      <;>
